C

COMMENT - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 

D

debuginfo(String) - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
 

E

exceptions - 程序包 exceptions
 
EXPECTED_EXCEPTIONS - 类中的静态变量 TestScannerException
 

I

IllegalIdentifierLengthException - exceptions中的异常错误类
 
IllegalIdentifierLengthException() - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.IllegalIdentifierLengthException
 
IllegalIdentifierLengthException(String) - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.IllegalIdentifierLengthException
 
IllegalIntegerException - exceptions中的异常错误类
 
IllegalIntegerException() - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.IllegalIntegerException

IllegalIntegerRangeException(String) - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.IllegalIntegerRangeException
 
IllegalOctalException - exceptions中的异常错误类

main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 TestScanner

O

OberonException - exceptions中的异常错误类
 
OberonException() - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.OberonException
 
OberonException(String) - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.OberonException
 
OberonScanner - 未命名程序包中的类
 
OberonScanner(Reader) - 类的构造器 OberonScanner
Creates a new scanner

ParameterMismatchedException - exceptions中的异常错误类

T

TestScanner - 未命名程序包中的类
它接受一个或多个输入文件，并将它们传递给扫描器，直到所有文件都被扫描完为止。
TestScanner() - 类的构造器 TestScanner
 
TestScannerException - 未命名程序包中的类
测试异常处理
TestScannerException() - 类的构造器 TestScannerException
 
testScannerFile(String) - 类中的静态方法 TestScannerException
测试单个文件的词法分析和异常捕获
TypeMismatchedException - exceptions中的异常错误类
 
TypeMismatchedException() - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.TypeMismatchedException
 
TypeMismatchedException(String) - 异常错误类的构造器 exceptions.TypeMismatchedException
 

Y

yyatEOF() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Returns whether the scanner has reached the end of the reader it reads from.
yybegin(int) - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Enters a new lexical state.
yychar - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Number of characters up to the start of the matched text.
yycharat(int) - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Returns the character at the given position from the matched text.
yyclose() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Closes the input reader.
yycolumn - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Number of characters from the last newline up to the start of the matched text.
YYEOF - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
This character denotes the end of file.
YYINITIAL - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
yylength() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
How many characters were matched.
yylex() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Resumes scanning until the next regular expression is matched, the end of input is encountered or an I/O-Error occurs.
yyline - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Number of newlines encountered up to the start of the matched text.
yypushback(int) - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Pushes the specified amount of characters back into the input stream.
yyreset(Reader) - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Resets the scanner to read from a new input stream.
yyResetPosition() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Resets the input position.
yystate() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Returns the current lexical state.
yytext() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Returns the text matched by the current regular expression.

Z

ZZ_ACTION - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Translates DFA states to action switch labels.
ZZ_ACTION_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_ATTRIBUTE - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
ZZ_ATTRIBUTE[aState] contains the attributes of state aState
ZZ_ATTRIBUTE_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_BUFFERSIZE - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Initial size of the lookahead buffer.
ZZ_CMAP_BLOCKS - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Second-level tables for translating characters to character classes
ZZ_CMAP_BLOCKS_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_CMAP_TOP - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Top-level table for translating characters to character classes
ZZ_CMAP_TOP_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_ERROR_MSG - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Error messages for OberonScanner.ZZ_UNKNOWN_ERROR, OberonScanner.ZZ_NO_MATCH, and OberonScanner.ZZ_PUSHBACK_2BIG respectively.
ZZ_LEXSTATE - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
ZZ_LEXSTATE[l] is the state in the DFA for the lexical state l ZZ_LEXSTATE[l+1] is the state in the DFA for the lexical state l at the beginning of a line l is of the form l = 2*k, k a non negative integer
ZZ_NO_MATCH - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Error code for "could not match input".
ZZ_PUSHBACK_2BIG - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Error code for "pushback value was too large".
ZZ_ROWMAP - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Translates a state to a row index in the transition table
ZZ_ROWMAP_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_TRANS - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
The transition table of the DFA
ZZ_TRANS_PACKED_0 - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
 
ZZ_UNKNOWN_ERROR - 类中的静态变量 OberonScanner
Error code for "Unknown internal scanner error".
zzAtBOL - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Whether the scanner is currently at the beginning of a line.
zzAtEOF - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Whether the scanner is at the end of file.
zzBuffer - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
This buffer contains the current text to be matched and is the source of the OberonScanner.yytext() string.
zzCMap(int) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
Translates raw input code points to DFA table row
zzCurrentPos - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Current text position in the buffer.
zzEndRead - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Marks the last character in the buffer, that has been read from input.
zzEOFDone - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Whether the user-EOF-code has already been executed.
zzFinalHighSurrogate - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
The number of occupied positions in OberonScanner.zzBuffer beyond OberonScanner.zzEndRead.
zzLexicalState - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Current lexical state.
zzMarkedPos - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Text position at the last accepting state.
zzReader - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Input device.
zzRefill() - 类中的方法 OberonScanner
Refills the input buffer.
zzScanError(int) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
Reports an error that occurred while scanning.
zzStartRead - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Marks the beginning of the OberonScanner.yytext() string in the buffer.
zzState - 类中的变量 OberonScanner
Current state of the DFA.
zzUnpackAction() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackAction(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackAttribute() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackAttribute(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackcmap_blocks() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackcmap_blocks(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackcmap_top() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackcmap_top(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackRowMap() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackRowMap(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackTrans() - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
 
zzUnpackTrans(String, int, int[]) - 类中的静态方法 OberonScanner
